examples.text: This molecule is a member of coumarins and a glycoside.

This molecule is a beta-D-glucoside with 2-(3,4-dihydroxyphenyl)ethoxy residue at the anomeric position and a [(4-hydroxyphenyl)acetyl]oxy residue at position 2. Isolated from Ternstroemia japonica, i

This molecule is a pyrrolopyrimidine that is pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidine substituted at position 4 by an N-methyl,N-(1-cyanoacetyl-4-methylpiperidin-3-yl)amino moiety. Used as its citrate salt to treat m
This molecule has been used in trials studying the treatment of Osteoarthritis.
This molecule is a Standardized Chemical Allergen. The physiologic effect of dipentamethylenethiuram disulfide is by means of Increased Histamine Release, and Cell-mediated Immunity.
This molecule appears as a colorless to straw-colored liquid with a sharp penetrating odor. Denser than water and soluble in water. Severly irritates skin and eyes. Toxic by ingestion and inhalation.
This molecule has been reported in Ruppia maritima with data available.
This molecule is an azamacrocycle and a lactam.
This molecule has been reported in Sarcocapnos crassifolia and Sarcocapnos enneaphylla with data available.

This molecule is an L-methionine derivative in which the sulfur has been oxidised to the corresponding sulfone. It has a role as an animal metabolite. It is a L-methionine derivative, a non-proteinoge
This molecule has been reported in Viburnum ayavacense with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Scytonema mirabile with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Akebia trifoliata and Syzygium sandwicense with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Penicillium citrinum and Aspergillus sclerotiorum with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Sanghuangporus baumii with data available.
This molecule is a glycoside. It has a role as a metabolite.
This molecule is a small molecule drug with a maximum clinical trial phase of II (across all indications) and has 3 investigational indications.
This molecule has been reported in Rhodiola rosea, Solanum lycopersicum, and other organisms with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Orixa japonica with data available.
This molecule has been reported in Goniothalamus amuyon with data available.
